title: Asia markets trade lower as oil surges after U.S. moves to blockade Iran ports
summary_full: Oil prices surged past $100 after U.S.-Iran talks collapsed and Washington moved toward a naval blockade, setting a cautious tone for Asia markets at the open.
summary_public: Oil prices surged past $100 after U.S.-Iran talks collapsed and Washington moved toward a naval blockade, setting a cautious tone for Asia markets at the open.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. moves to blockade Iran ports
